coreResponsibility.summary: A Kaltura Player plugin that provides an interactive transcript panel for displaying, searching, and navigating video captions/subtitles in sync with video playback.

featureOwnership: Transcript panel UI rendering and management
Caption/subtitle display synchronized with video playback
Transcript search functionality with result navigation
Auto-scroll to active caption during playback
Multi-language transcript support with language switching
Side panel positioning (left, right, top, bottom)
Responsive layout for different screen sizes

manages: Caption cue points (id, startTime, endTime, text)
transforms: Raw timed metadata into sanitized caption objects
Caption text sanitization (HTML removal, character decoding)

repositories.name: playkit-js-kaltura-cuepoints
repositories.purpose: Provides caption cue point data and timed metadata events

repositories.name: playkit-js-ui-managers
repositories.purpose: Provides SidePanelsManager and UpperBarManager services for panel/icon registration

repositories.name: kaltura-player-js
repositories.purpose: Core player instance, event system, and base plugin infrastructure

services: kalturaCuepoints service (cue point registration and events)

consumers: Custom video player implementations using Kaltura Player

thirdPartySDKs.name: sanitize-html
thirdPartySDKs.purpose: Sanitizes caption text to remove potentially harmful HTML

errorPatterns: kalturaCuepoints, sidePanelsManager or upperBarManager haven't registered
transcript plugin is not supported for live entries
